title: MISSION BRIEFING
speaker: handler
lines: Cipher, listen up. The network knows you're here. The Gatekeeper's destruction sent a shockwave through the entire AI hierarchy.
They've flagged your signal. This isn't a perimeter defense anymore — this is retaliation. They're coming for you specifically.
Intel shows a second construct deep in the mid-level architecture: The Avenger. Fast. Aggressive. It knows what happened to the Gatekeeper, and it's not going to make the same mistake.
Enemy behavior has shifted across the board. Coordinated attacks. Shorter response times. The Overseers are pulling the constructs into formation. Expect group tactics and pursuit protocols.
The amber zone is hostile territory. Denser defenses, faster corridors, tighter attack windows. Everything you saw in the outer perimeter — expect it harder and faster.
Your weapons are still hot. Use Logic Bombs on the heavy targets. EMP when they swarm. Save the Virus Payload for The Avenger's core.
Wraith never made it this deep. You're in uncharted territory now, Cipher.
Initiating mid-level insertion. Stay sharp — they're already hunting you.
